reviews.review_msg: The best course I have taken in the criminology side of my degree, I would 100% take another hybrid course or TA for her. Lectures/discussions were great. Greer listens to students' needs and accommodates everyone. Exams were a breeze because of the materials online and we discuss them in class the next week. The paper was fun to write too! 10/10!!

A true queen. Super supportive and was willing to adjust the course due to zoom university. Overall 20/10 would recommend a course with Dr. Greer any day and I highly recommend a drug policy course with the queen herself since she is super knowledgeable and it's one of the few courses in my undergraduate that I actually learned something....
